channel.title: Aaron - Drum
channel.description:
Code & Rhythm explores the harmony between logic and creativity.

I’m Aaron — a product engineer, designer, and drummer.
Here, we dive into AI systems, product strategy, and the rhythms that drive great work.

Code builds the structure. Rhythm gives it soul.
